name: facevent

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "cd backend && venv/Scripts/activate && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000"
scripts.dev:mac: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000"

description: > Upload event photos → AI indexes all faces → Students find their photos with a selfie.
